gate_is_ai_system.label: Is your system an 'AI system' under the EU AI Act (Article 3(1))?

e1_entity_type.label: Which kind of entity is your organisation?

e2_modifications.label: Do you (or a downstream operator) make substantial modifications to the system?

e3_product_integration.label: Does your product integrate an AI system under your manufacturer name?

options.integrated: Yes — placed on market or put into service with my product

hr1_annex_i.label: Is the system a product with AI as safety component under Annex I harmonisation law?

hr2_annex_iii.label: Does the system fall within an Annex III high-risk use case?

hr3_art_6_3.label: Does Article 6(3) apply (safety component required for product conformity)?

hr4_narrow_task.label: Is the AI intended only for a narrow procedural task (Art 6(3) exception)?

hr5_no_significant_risk.label: Does the system NOT pose significant risk to health, safety, or fundamental rights?

hr6_accessory.label: Is the system purely accessory to the relevant human decision (Art 6(3))?

s1_in_scope.label: Are you placing, deploying, or using the system's output in the EU?

options.eu: Established or located in the EU

s1_gpai.label: Are you placing a General-Purpose AI model on the EU market?

s1_gpai_systemic_risk.label: Does the GPAI model have systemic risk (high impact capabilities)?

r2_excluded.label: Is the system excluded (military, R&D only, open-source not yet placed, personal use)?

r3_prohibited.label: Does the system perform prohibited practices under Article 5?

r4_transparency.label: Does the system require transparency obligations (chatbot, deepfake, synthetic content)?

r5_fria.label: Are you a public body or private entity providing public services (FRIA under Art 27)?
